_README: Starter asset pack for the FROZEN theme. The paths below are EXAMPLES using Megascans/Bridge naming — replace them with YOUR imported assets' reference paths, then activate (see examples/assetpacks/README.md). Any path you haven't imported is skipped and falls back to a prototype shape for that placement, so a build never breaks.
_how_to_get_paths: In the UE editor, right-click an asset → Copy Reference, then paste just the /Game/... path (drop the class prefix and the '.Name' suffix). Or skip manifests entirely: with the editor-in-the-loop on, Playsmith auto-discovers whatever Megascans/Fab content you've installed.
name: Nordic Frost (starter)
